mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_flow (item_id, change_amount, change_type, ref_type, ref_id, warehouse_id, created_at) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{changeAmount}, #{changeType}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{warehouseId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_flow ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM stock_flow WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT item_id as itemId, MAX(created_at) as lastDate FROM stock_flow GROUP BY item_id
